title: Billable package folder DB3 linking
description:
You can dependably link a WinCan .db3 to a customer / project folder when building a billable package in PipeShare.

What changed: the Folder DB3 strip is visible again in the cloud file explorer (it was implemented but not shown). After Create new project structure, PipeShare opens the new folder and offers to link a .db3 immediately. Manual folder DB3 assignments also stick when you switch videos (Wasabi vs UI scope fix from earlier today).

Who is affected: PipeShare on BASE and SaaS when packaging customer jobs with videos + one shared WinCan database.
changeLog: Show Billable package · folder DB3 strip in the cloud explorer for customer folders.
After Create new project structure, open the folder and offer to link a WinCan .db3.
Local project structure marks the new folder as a jobsite so the Jobsite DB3 strip appears.
Keep folder DB3 assignments across video switches (Wasabi/UI scope merge).
